title: WeBuild – DUNS Legal Entity Attestation – SD-JWT VC payload
description: Schema for the SD-JWT VC payload of a DUNS Legal Entity Attestation as defined in the DUNS Attestation Rulebook (Chapter 3.2). This models the JSON claims set prior to SD-JWT disclosure/packing. The attestation provides a standardized, verifiable representation of a legal entity's business profile as registered with Dun & Bradstreet, including legal identity, operational status, registration details, and industry classification.

vct.description: Verifiable Credential Type identifier. SHALL be 'eu.we-build:duns:1'.

iss.description: Issuer of the attestation. Identifies the entity that issued the DUNS Legal Entity Attestation (self-issued by legal entity for EAA, or QTSP for QEAA). Follows RFC 7519.

iat.description: Issuance date as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). Represents the date and time when the attestation was issued per ISO 8601 / RFC 7519. SHALL NOT be selectively disclosable.

exp.description: Expiry date as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). Represents the date and time when the attestation expires per ISO 8601 / RFC 7519. SHALL be later than 'iat'. SHALL NOT be selectively disclosable.

issuing_entity.description: The identifier of the legal entity or QTSP that issued the attestation. For self-issued EAA this is typically a DID or URI of the subject entity. For QEAA this is the identifier of the qualified trust service provider. SHALL NOT be selectively disclosable.

issuing_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the country in which the issuer is established. SHALL NOT be selectively disclosable.

attestation_legal_category.description: The legal category of the attestation as defined by eIDAS 2. SHALL be 'EAA' when self-issued by the legal entity, or 'QEAA' when issued by a qualified trust service provider (QTSP). SHALL NOT be selectively disclosable.

schema_version.description: Version of the DUNS Legal Entity attestation schema used. SHALL be a non-empty string when present.

trust_anchor_url.description: URL at which a machine-readable version of the trust anchor used for verifying the DUNS Legal Entity Attestation can be found or looked up. When present, SHALL be a valid URI.

duns_number.description: Nine-digit unique identifier assigned by Dun & Bradstreet (Data Universal Numbering System) to the legal entity. SHALL be a non-empty nine-digit numeric string. SHALL be individually selectively disclosable.

legal_entity.description: Object encapsulating the legal identity of the entity as registered with Dun & Bradstreet, including legal name, legal form, and registered address. SHALL be individually selectively disclosable as a top-level claim.

legal_name.description: The registered legal name of the entity. SHALL be a non-empty string.

legal_form.description: The legal form of the entity (e.g., GmbH, AG, Ltd., SRL, N.V., SAS). SHALL be a non-empty string.

registered_address.description: The official registered address of the entity. The object itself is mandatory; all sub-fields are optional and independently selectively disclosable to allow partial disclosure of location information.

street.description: Street name of the registered address. Optional; MAY be omitted if not available.

nr.description: Street or building number of the registered address. Optional; MAY be omitted if not available.

postal_code.description: Postal or ZIP code of the registered address. Optional; MAY be omitted if not available.

city.description: City or municipality of the registered address. Optional; MAY be omitted if not available.

country.description: Country of the registered address. When present, SHALL conform to ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (two-letter country code). Optional; MAY be omitted if not available.

operational_status.description: Current operational status of the entity. SHALL be a non-empty string. SHOULD use one of the standardized values defined in Section 2.8.1 (Active, Inactive, Dissolved, Suspended, Bankrupt). SHALL be individually selectively disclosable.

operational_status_date.description: Date on which the operational status was last confirmed or changed. SHALL conform to ISO 8601 full-date format (YYYY-MM-DD). SHALL be individually selectively disclosable.

date_of_incorporation.description: Date on which the legal entity was incorporated or formally established. SHALL conform to ISO 8601 full-date format (YYYY-MM-DD). SHALL be individually selectively disclosable.

registration.description: Object providing details about the entity's formal registration with the competent authority. All four sub-fields are mandatory. SHALL be individually selectively disclosable as a top-level claim.

jurisdiction.description: The jurisdiction in which the entity is registered (e.g., country or region code). SHALL be a non-empty string.

initial_registration_date.description: The date the entity was first registered with the competent authority. SHALL conform to ISO 8601 full-date format (YYYY-MM-DD).

last_update_date.description: The date the registration record was last updated. SHALL conform to ISO 8601 full-date format (YYYY-MM-DD). SHALL be equal to or later than 'initial_registration_date'.

registration_status.description: The current status of the registration record. SHALL be a non-empty string. SHOULD use one of the standardized values defined in Section 2.8.2 (Active, Suspended, Cancelled, Pending).

industry_classification.description: Object providing the NAICS-based industry classification of the entity. Primary NAICS code and NAICS version are mandatory; secondary NAICS codes are optional. SHALL be individually selectively disclosable as a top-level claim.

primary_naics.description: The primary NAICS code representing the entity's main business activity. SHALL be a non-empty string containing a valid NAICS code.

secondary_naics.description: An optional array of zero or more additional NAICS codes representing secondary business activities of the entity. MAY contain zero or more values.

items.description: A NAICS code representing a secondary business activity.

naics_version.description: The version of the NAICS standard used. SHALL be a non-empty string identifying the applicable NAICS edition. SHOULD use one of the standardized values defined in Section 2.8.3 (2022, 2017, 2012).

status.description: Status object per SD-JWT VC status-list mechanism. MUST be present when the technical validity period (exp - iat) is greater than 24 hours. Enables Relying Parties to check the revocation status of the credential.

type.description: Status mechanism type. For SD-JWT VC Status List this SHALL be 'status-list'.

status_list_credential.description: URI of the Status List Credential document that contains the bitstring indicating revocation status.

status_list_index.description: Zero-based index into the status list bitstring that corresponds to this credential.

status_purpose.description: Purpose of the status entry. For the DUNS Legal Entity Attestation this SHALL be 'revocation'.

cnf.description: Confirmation claims per SD-JWT VC. Holder binding via JWK is recommended. The DUNS Legal Entity Attestation SHALL be cryptographically bound to the specific holder wallet.

jwk.description: Public key bound to the holder wallet.

crv.description: Elliptic curve name (e.g., 'P-256'). Required for EC keys.

x.description: X coordinate of the EC public key (Base64url encoded).

y.description: Y coordinate of the EC public key (Base64url encoded).

n.description: RSA modulus (Base64url encoded). Required for RSA keys.

e.description: RSA public exponent (Base64url encoded). Required for RSA keys.
